sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Terminology 29

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Terminology 29:1
items.html:
(to the question) Delet ve Tzir Bet [a door and a second hinge]
From the discernments of the twenty-two letters that the Nukva received from ZA at the time of Katnut [smallness], the first door [Delet] and hinge [Tzir] in her Yesod were corrected; and from the twenty-two letters that the Nukva received from Ima, not through ZA, the second door and hinge were made. See Answer 28. (p. 790, Item 87; p. 794, the paragraph beginning "VeZeh Amro VaHarei"; and p. 795, Item 93)
